div.head: The Consul at Geneva (Tuck) to the Secretary of State
div.p: Council today adopted Stresemann report fixing date Diplomatic Conference Abolition Export and Import Prohibitions [and] Restrictions for October 17, 1927. This date chosen in order not to conflict with proposed meeting Preparatory Commission for Disarmament in November.For correspondence concerning the fourth session of the Preparatory Commission, see pp. 159 ff. Report calls attention of states invited to Conference to conclusion[s] formulated by International Economic ConferenceSee pp. 238 ff. on the subject [of] prohibitions. All countries who sent delegations to Economic Conference will receive invitation to attend.
